name: Stairs Calf Stretch
shortDescription: A stretch performed using stairs to lengthen and increase flexibility in the calf muscles.
instructions: Stand on the edge of a step with your heels hanging off. Slowly lower your heels toward the ground, feeling the stretch in your calves. Hold, then return to starting position or alternate legs.
steps: Stand with the balls of your feet on a step or stair.
Support yourself with a railing, wall, or sturdy object.
Lower your heels slowly below the step to feel a stretch in your calves.
Raise heels back up and repeat as desired.
formCues: Keep knees straight but not locked
breathing: Exhale as you lower into the stretch, inhale as you return.
